brief.humanQuestion: Which of three structurally distinct implementation shapes should we build?
brief.primaryRepresentation: three equal columns with a criterion-major verdict matrix
brief.humanAction: inspect columns, select one path, optionally add a rationale
brief.consequence: selection highlights the column, flips working status, and rewrites the candidate export
brief.firstViewport: decision question, constraints, and all three alternatives side by side
brief.export: candidate Markdown/JSON with selected path, rationale, unresolved items
brief.noJs: columns, matrix, and recommendation stay readable; decide by replying in chat
